sections.label: Chorus
lines: Muang un! Muang un! Khuamial a lauhuai hang;
Muang un! Khua hong vak dekta hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Muang un! Gal a tam hangin, a lauhuai lampi
Ze-etna a tam hangin, lam hong hilh ding Topa’n.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: ding hi, I Topa pha bel hi;
Muang un! A umte’n zo ding, I Topa phabel hi.
